outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump declines to give timeline on ending war with Iran: 'Don't rush me'
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Trump refusing to set timeline, Lebanon ceasefire extension, Hezbollah rockets at Shtula, and Pentagon casualty count controversy.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Trump orders U.S. to attack Iran boats mining Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: NBC covers Trump's shoot-and-kill order, 7 ships transiting Hormuz in 12 hours, and Lebanon ceasefire extension.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US used roughly half its Patriot interceptors in Iran war — yearslong rebuild looms, CSIS finds
outlets.summary: Fox leads with CSIS munitions depletion report — 50% Patriot interceptors, 850+ Tomahawks expended. Frames as readiness concern for China deterrence.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Iran War pushes gas past $4 — US still paying far less than most countries
outlets.summary: Coverage framing US gas prices as painful but noting Americans pay less than European allies hit harder by the Hormuz blockade.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US to 'shoot and kill' Iranian boats laying mines in Hormuz, Trump says
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with Trump's shoot-and-kill order for Hormuz, Iran's coordinated unity statement, and Lebanon ceasefire extension.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Trump announces three-week extension of Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
outlets.summary: France 24 covers Lebanon ceasefire extension, UK-France led Hormuz planning conference with 30+ nations.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump declares 3-week truce extension as Israel and Lebanon hold talks at White House
outlets.summary: ToI covers ceasefire extension, Hezbollah rockets at Shtula, two IDF soldiers indicted for Iran espionage, and Israeli security discussion on 'decision point.'

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Two Air Force soldiers charged with spying for Iran; Hezbollah fires rockets at Israel
outlets.summary: Haaretz leads with espionage indictment and Shtula rocket attack. Notes Israeli officials see 'decision point' on Iran nearing.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Military aggression failed, US bullying won't open Strait of Hormuz: Qalibaf
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Hormuz closure as Iran's sovereign right, highlights Qalibaf statement that reopening is impossible during US blockade.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran leaders unite: 'No radicals or moderates — we are all revolutionary'
outlets.summary: Coverage of coordinated unity statement by all senior Iranian officials rejecting Trump's 'fracture' claims.
